item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Juvenile Justice Reform
item.description:
👀 Juvenile Justice Reform

Federal juvenile justice reauthorization 119th Congress: diversion programs · status-offender provisions · racial disparities · Tribal juvenile-justice composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 12 + Federal Prison Education + Trust Graph #5. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
